items.label: Part 4 Processing Yes/No
items.form_text: Yes/No answers about criminal history, prostitution, terrorism, presence near harm, and immigration proceedings.

fields.label: Committed a crime/offense without being arrested
Arrested, cited, or detained by law enforcement
Charged with a crime or offense
Convicted of a crime or offense
Placed in alternative sentencing or diversion
Drug trafficking or controlled substance involvement
Espionage or threats to U.S. security
Recruitment or use of child soldiers

items.instruction: Each Yes triggers a Part 8 addendum with factual detail (date, place, agency, outcome). Do NOT mark Yes without explicit evidence.
items.where_to_verify: FBI Records; Court Disposition; LEA Report; Declaration; EOIR Portal

items.label: Interpreter Used?
items.section: Part 6. Interpreter's Contact Information, Certification, and Signature
items.instruction: Answer Yes only when an interpreter actually assisted the derivative.

items.label: Interpreter Full Name
items.section: Part 6. Interpreter's Contact Information, Certification, and Signature
items.instruction: Use the firm interpreter's name when applicable.

items.label: Interpreter Business or Organization
items.section: Part 6. Interpreter's Contact Information, Certification, and Signature
items.default_value: Law Offices of Manuel E. Solis, PLLC
items.instruction: Use firm name when the interpreter is firm staff.

items.label: Preparer Full Name
items.section: Part 7. Contact Information, Declaration, and Signature of the Person Preparing this Supplement A, if Other Than the Applicant
items.instruction: Name of the firm attorney or staff who prepared the form.

items.label: Preparer Business or Organization
items.section: Part 7. Contact Information, Declaration, and Signature of the Person Preparing this Supplement A, if Other Than the Applicant
items.default_value: Law Offices of Manuel E. Solis, PLLC

items.label: Preparer Daytime Phone
items.section: Part 7. Contact Information, Declaration, and Signature of the Person Preparing this Supplement A, if Other Than the Applicant
items.instruction: Firm phone unless an alternate office line applies.

items.label: Preparer Email
items.section: Part 7. Contact Information, Declaration, and Signature of the Person Preparing this Supplement A, if Other Than the Applicant
items.instruction: Firm email; do not use a personal address.
